mission.active_goal: Track the current validated state of one hardware/software compatibility lane.
non_goals: Do not claim support outside the tested hardware/software matrix.
Do not treat a single successful run as production stability.
success_criteria: Tested workflow is reproducible from documented commands.
Blockers and unsafe claims are explicit.

current_state.current_blocker: Example blocker: batch path instability above the tested context size.
current_state.next_safest_action: Reproduce the failure with the smallest documented command and attach logs to the LogDoc.
current_state.do_not_do_next: Do not advertise general backend stability or production serving readiness.

validated: Single-user prompt path runs in the tested local configuration.
partially_validated: Longer context and batch behavior show progress but are not stable.

blocked.summary: Batch serving behavior is unstable in the current lane.

risk_boundaries: Do not generalize beyond the exact tested hardware/software/model matrix.
Do not publish performance comparisons without repeatable benchmark conditions.

open_blockers.summary: Batch serving path is not validated as stable.

next_session_bootstrap.do_not_start_with: Do not begin with broad benchmark/public claims.

allowed_claims: The tested single-user workflow works for the documented lane.
not_allowed_claims: All models and quantizations are supported.
The result applies to untested hardware or driver versions.
